_comment: Performance regression thresholds for VoteChain. All times in milliseconds. A run fails when any measured value exceeds its threshold. Adjust these after establishing a stable baseline on your target hardware.

api._comment_multiplier: Fail if current p95 > baseline_p95 * regression_multiplier (i.e. >2x slower)

absolute_max_ms._comment: Hard ceiling regardless of baseline — catches first-run regressions

contract._comment_multiplier: Fail if current mean_ns > baseline_mean_ns * regression_multiplier

absolute_max_us._comment: Hard ceiling in microseconds (Soroban in-process, not network)
